name: add-ir-op
description: Recipe for adding a new IR operation type across the entire stack. Use whenever the Op enum gains a new variant.

C++ core: core/src/ir/validate.cpp — Validate the new op's invariants
core/tests/test_decoder.cpp — Decoder test for the x86 encoding
Rust prisma-ir: shell/prisma-ir/src/lib.rs — Add struct + Op enum variant
shell/prisma-ir/src/lib.rs — Add serde test for round-trip
Rust downstream (affected): shell/prisma-passes/src/ — Add match arm if op affects DCE/CSE/const_prop
shell/prisma-decoder/src/ — Add decode case for the x86 opcode
Spec: ir-spec/PrismaIR/Syntax.lean — Add constructor to Op type
